title: Wireshark Learn Card Links
description: Schema for Wireshark welcome page learn card link configuration (learn_card.json).

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be 1 or higher.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support.

url.description: Target URL opened when the link is clicked.

label.description: Full link text shown in expanded mode.

short_label.description: Abbreviated link text shown in compact/collapsed mode.

tooltip.description: Tooltip and accessible description for the link.

scheme.description: Controls when the link is shown. 'stable' shows only in stable releases, 'dev' shows only in development builds. If omitted, the link is shown in all builds.

url.description: Target URL opened when the button is clicked.

tooltip.description: Tooltip and accessible description for the button.

color.description: Background color of the button in hex format.

hover.description: Background color of the button on hover in hex format.
